content:
What do you neec to complete  this task deployment live end to end now ? RORK FINAL FORCE LIVE DEPLOY — END TO END NOW

Do not give another audit only. Execute fixes and deploy.

CURRENT REAL BLOCKERS:
1. Missing GET /api/ivx/members route.
2. Supabase picture_url migration not verified.
3. Android/iOS real signup and members not verified live.
4. Senior Developer proof ledger empty or incomplete.
5. Fake/demo task ledger data must be removed or marked SAMPLE, not real.
6. GitHub SHA + Render Deploy ID must be captured for every verified task.

EXECUTE NOW:
1. Add GET /api/ivx/members real members list route.
2. Route must return only real database members, no fake/demo/chatbot data.
3. Add filters/counts for members, investors, buyers, JV deals, tokenized.
4. Apply/verify Supabase picture_url migration.
5. Verify signup without picture.
6. Verify signup with picture.
7. Verify Android signup form live.
8. Verify iOS signup form live.
9. Verify Android home shows same modules/counts as iOS:
   - 38 Members
   - 6 Investors
   - 3 Live Deals
   - Up to 22% Annual Returns
10. Verify Members module shows real members only.
11. Remove or clearly label fake task-orchestrator/demo ledger data.
12. Fix senior developer proof ledger.
13. Run one real owner-chat senior developer task.
14. Capture changed files, tests, GitHub SHA, Render Deploy ID, live verification.
15. Push to GitHub main.
16. Trigger Render deployment.
17. Verify /health HTTP 200.
18. Verify /version equals GitHub HEAD.
19. Verify production UI screenshots: Android, iOS, web.
20. Return final evidence only.

FINAL RESPONSE FORMAT ONLY:

STATE:
ROOT_CAUSE:
FILES_CHANGED:
SUPABASE_MIGRATION_STATUS:
MEMBERS_ROUTE_STATUS:
REAL_MEMBERS_COUNT:
ANDROID_STATUS:
IOS_STATUS:
SIGNUP_STATUS:
MEMBERS_MODULE_STATUS:
FAKE_DATA_STATUS:
SENIOR_DEVELOPER_PROOF_STATUS:
TESTS_RUN:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
SCREENSHOTS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULE:
Do not mark VERIFIED unless every item is live in production with evidence.
If credentials/secrets are missing, return exact missing variable names and runtime proof only.
No narrative. No fake proof. No “verified + blocked” contradiction.
